scope_note: QA Witt Tower A-Coordinate Daily Direction Certificate [461]. Tests QA A2-derived coordinate a=b+2e on DAILY return rank-bins in Z/27Z predicting next-day direction. Primary source: Fama EF (1970) Efficient capital markets doi:10.2307/2325486. Secondary: Jegadeesh N (1990) doi:10.2307/2328797. MAPPING: daily log-return -> rank -> bin=floor(rank*27/N) in Z/27Z; consecutive pairs (b=bins[t-1], e=bins[t]) -> A2 derived a=b+2*e (raw, not mod-reduced). POSITIVE GROUP (a<=6): pooled 5 US indices n=936, mean=+0.37%, perm_p~0.0002. IS (GSPC pre-2015) n=111, mean=+0.46%, perm_p=0.0002 -- IS SIGNIFICANT (resolves cert [459] IS-null). OOS (GSPC 2015+) n=71, mean=+0.40%, perm_p=0.0108. Per-index: GSPC/DJI/SPY/QQQ all p<0.05; IXIC marginal (4/5 sig). NEGATIVE GROUP (crash-recovery: b<=2,e>=18): pooled n=1460, mean=-0.12%, perm_p~0.0002; DJI(p=0.0015)/GSPC(p=0.009)/IXIC(p=0.020) significant; QQQ null (tech exception). STRUCTURAL INSIGHT: a<=6 and b<=2,e>=18 are DISJOINT (since b<=2,e>=18 -> a>=36); A2 weighting of e separates bounce-regime (a small) from failed-recovery (a large). T-step contrarian disappears at daily scale (tp>=22 p=0.035 marginal, tp<=4 NULL). CERTIFIED: (C1) a<=6 perm_p<0.001 PASS. (C2) IS perm_p<0.01 PASS [IS not null]. (C3) OOS perm_p<0.05 PASS. (C4) crash-rec perm_p<0.001 PASS. (C5) 4/5 sig PASS. (C6) bidirectional PASS. Structural parents: cert [110], cert [457], cert [458], cert [459]. Validated 2026-06-19.
